title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pearson India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pearson India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!
